group.name: User Identification
group.description: User-assigned name and description for this node

string.name: Node Description
string.description: Longer description of this node (max 63 characters)

group.name: Clock Identity
group.description: Selects which 6-byte Specific Upper Part this generator owns. Per BroadcastTimeS §4 the four well-known IDs cover the common case; pick Custom to use the 48-bit ID configured below from the manufacturer/owner unique ID space.

int.name: Clock ID
int.description: 0 = Default Fast (01.01.00.00.01.00), 1 = Default Real-time (01.01.00.00.01.01), 2 = Alternate 1 (01.01.00.00.01.02), 3 = Alternate 2 (01.01.00.00.01.03), 4 = Custom (uses the 48-bit value below)

int.name: Custom Clock ID (48-bit)
int.description: Used only when Clock ID above is set to Custom. Must be a valid OpenLCB 48-bit unique ID controlled by the manufacturer or operator; collisions with the 4 reserved IDs above are not permitted.

group.name: Boot Defaults
group.description: Values applied when the node starts. The node may diverge from these at run-time via Set events from the bus or the local UI.

int.name: Auto-start
int.description: 0 = boot stopped, 1 = boot running. The library auto-advances modeled time only while running.

int.name: Initial Rate (raw)
int.description: 12-bit signed fixed-point rate per spec §4.4: rate * 4. e.g. 4 = 1.00x, 16 = 4.00x, -4 = -1.00x. Range -2048..2047 (i.e. -512.00x..511.75x).
